infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: VaultChat needs camera access to take photos and videos.
infoPlist.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: VaultChat needs microphone access for voice and video calls.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: VaultChat needs photo library access to share photos.
infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: VaultChat needs location access to share your location.
infoPlist.NSFaceIDUsageDescription: VaultChat uses Face ID to securely unlock the app.
